1.0.0.en: Initial release with manual target pairing, online/offline status capability, periodic probes, flow cards, and ICMP/TCP probe modes.
1.0.0.nl: Eerste release met handmatig toevoegen van doelen, online/offline status-capability, periodieke controles, flow-kaarten en ICMP/TCP controlemodi.

1.0.1.en: Stability improvements, icon update, and automated GitHub publish support.
1.0.1.nl: Stabiliteitsverbeteringen, icoon-update en automatische GitHub publish ondersteuning.

1.0.3.en: Unified app/device/flow icons, improved autopublish workflow, and release pipeline fixes.
1.0.3.nl: Eenduidige app/apparaat/flow-iconen, verbeterde autopublish-workflow en fixes in de release-pipeline.
